title: metrosideros polymorpha f. pseudorugosa
intro: Metrosideros polymorpha f. pseudorugosa, also known as a variant of the New Zealand native tree Metrosideros polymorpha, is a plant species that belongs to the Myrtaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Hawaiian and Polynesian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Metrosideros polymorpha f. pseudorugosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
